tool_args.label: Authorization for 2026 MTA and TBTA New Money Bonds

payload.title: Authorization to Issue 2026 MTA and TBTA New Money Bonds, Bond Anticipation Notes, Refunding and Other Obligations; Approval of Reimbursement Resolutions for Federal Tax Purposes
payload.description: Staff summary and board resolutions authorizing issuance of new money bonds, BANs, refunding obligations, and loan facilities for 2026 MTA and TBTA capital programs and working capital

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA Finance Department

payload.description: Department seeking authorization to issue 2026 MTA and TBTA new money bonds, BANs, refunding obligations and other obligations

tool_args.label: Jaibala Patel, Chief Financial Officer

payload.title: Chief Financial Officer
payload.description: Chief Financial Officer, MTA Finance Department

tool_args.label: Olga Chernat, Deputy Chief, Financial Services

payload.title: Deputy Chief, Financial Services
payload.description: Deputy Chief, Financial Services, MTA Finance Department

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)

payload.description: Issuer of Series 2026 Obligations seeking board authorization for debt issuance

tool_args.label: Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority (TBTA)

payload.description: Issuer of TBTA Obligations under TBTA Multiple Credit and Series 2026 Supplemental Resolution

tool_args.label: MTA Transit and Commuter Capital Programs Authorized Amount

payload.raw_value_text: up to $7 billion for transit and commuter capital programs
payload.scope: MTA transit and commuter capital programs
payload.description: Authorized maximum amount for Series 2026 New Money Transit and Commuter Bonds and Notes under the MTA Multiple Credit Supplemental Resolution

tool_args.label: MTA Working Capital Borrowings Authorized Amount

payload.raw_value_text: up to $1.5 billion for MTA working capital borrowings
payload.scope: MTA working capital
payload.description: Authorized maximum amount for Series 2026 New Money Working Capital Notes and Bonds

tool_args.label: TBTA Capital Projects Authorized Amount

payload.raw_value_text: up to $700 million for TBTA capital projects
payload.scope: TBTA capital projects
payload.description: Authorized maximum amount for TBTA bridge and tunnel capital projects

tool_args.label: MTA and TBTA Board Adoption of 2026 Supplemental Resolutions

payload.event_name: Board adoption of Multiple Credit and Series 2026 Supplemental Resolutions
payload.description: MTA and TBTA Boards adopt the resolutions authorizing issuance of Series 2026 Obligations for capital programs and working capital

tool_args.label: Finance Committee Approval

payload.description: Finance Committee approval before Board action on December 17, 2025

tool_args.label: Purpose: Finance capital projects and working capital

payload.claim_text: The MTA Finance Department is seeking the MTA and TBTA Boards' authorization and approval of the necessary documentation to issue or incur new money bond anticipation notes (BANs), bonds and other obligations to finance (i) capital projects set forth in approved transit and commuter capital programs, (ii) MTA short-term (12 months or less) interim working capital borrowings, and (iii) capital projects set forth in TBTA's capital programs.
payload.description: Three-fold purpose of the authorization: transit/commuter capital programs, working capital, and TBTA capital projects

tool_args.label: Loan facilities as alternative to bonds

payload.claim_text: The MTA Finance Department will continue to explore similar loan opportunities that could be attractive compared to issuing notes or bonds.
payload.description: MTA may use loan facilities (e.g., RRIF program, congestion pricing revenue loan) as alternatives

tool_args.label: MTA Section 2.01(a) Authorized Principal Amount

payload.raw_value_text: aggregate principal amount not exceeding $7 billion at any one time Outstanding
payload.scope: MTA Series 2026 New Money Transit and Commuter Bonds and Notes under Applicable Transit and Commuter Resolutions
payload.description: Authorized Principal Amount for MTA transit and commuter obligations per Section 2.01(a) of the MTA Supplemental Resolution

tool_args.label: MTA Section 2.01(b) Working Capital Authorized Amount

payload.raw_value_text: aggregate principal amount of not to exceed $1.5 billion at any one time outstanding
payload.scope: MTA Series 2026 New Money Working Capital Notes and Bonds under MTA PMT Resolution
payload.description: Authorized amount for MTA working capital borrowings per Section 2.01(b)

tool_args.label: TBTA Bridge and Tunnel Authorized Principal Amount

payload.raw_value_text: aggregate principal amount not exceeding $700 million at any one time Outstanding
payload.scope: TBTA Series 2026 New Money Bridge and Tunnel Bonds and Notes under Applicable Bridge and Tunnel Resolutions
payload.description: Authorized amount for TBTA bridge and tunnel capital projects per Section 2.01(b) of the TBTA Supplemental Resolution

tool_args.label: TBTA Transit and Commuter Authorized Amount

payload.raw_value_text: aggregate principal amount not exceeding $7 billion at any one time Outstanding under the Applicable Transit and Commuter Resolutions
payload.scope: TBTA Series 2026 New Money Transit and Commuter Bonds and Notes under Applicable Transit and Commuter Resolutions
payload.description: Transit and Commuter Authorized Principal Amount for TBTA-issued transit and commuter obligations per Section 2.01(a)

tool_args.label: MTA Reimbursement Resolution Maximum - Capital

payload.raw_value_text: $7 billion
payload.scope: MTA maximum principal amount of tax-exempt or tax-advantaged debt for Capital Project expenditures in 2026
payload.description: Per Section 5.01(e), MTA expects maximum principal amount of tax-exempt or tax-advantaged debt for Capital Project

tool_args.label: MTA Reimbursement Resolution Maximum - Working Capital

payload.raw_value_text: $1.5 billion
payload.scope: MTA maximum principal amount of taxable, tax-exempt or tax-advantaged debt for Working Capital Purposes in 2026
payload.description: Per Section 5.02(d), MTA expects maximum principal amount for Working Capital Purposes

tool_args.label: TBTA Reimbursement - Transit and Commuter Projects

payload.raw_value_text: $7 billion
payload.scope: TBTA maximum principal amount of tax-exempt or tax-advantaged debt for Applicable Transit and Commuter Project expenditures in 2026
payload.description: Per TBTA Section 5.01(e), TBTA expects $7 billion for transit and commuter project expenditures

tool_args.label: TBTA Reimbursement - Bridge and Tunnel Projects

payload.raw_value_text: $700 million
payload.scope: TBTA maximum principal amount of tax-exempt or tax-advantaged debt for Bridge and Tunnel Project expenditures in 2026
payload.description: Per TBTA Section 5.01(f), TBTA expects $700 million for bridge and tunnel project expenditures

tool_args.label: Working capital notes purpose and structure

payload.claim_text: The working capital notes are expected to mature and be repaid from available dedicated taxes and subsidies within 12 months of issuance and to be used to address a timing mismatch between expenses and revenues rather than be used as deficit financing.
payload.description: Working capital notes are short-term (12 months or less), repaid from dedicated taxes/subsidies, not deficit financing

tool_args.label: Types of obligations authorized

payload.claim_text: The attached annual supplemental resolutions provide for the financings of capital projects and working capital through the issuance of MTA's (i) Transportation Revenue obligations, (ii) Dedicated Tax Fund senior and subordinate obligations, and (iii) Payroll Mobility Tax obligations for working capital; and of TBTA's (i) senior, subordinate and second subordinate obligations, (ii) Payroll Mobility Tax senior and subordinate obligations, (iii) Sales Tax Revenue senior and subordinate obligations, (iv) Real Estate Transfer Tax Revenue senior and subordinate obligations, and (v) CRZ Tolling senior and subordinate obligations.
payload.description: Types of MTA and TBTA obligations authorized under the resolutions

tool_args.label: Continuation of authorization

payload.claim_text: The authorization to issue or incur the bonds, BANs, loan facilities and other obligations and take other related actions hereunder shall continue in effect without any further action by the MTA and TBTA Boards until the adoption by the MTA and TBTA Boards of subsequent bond supplemental resolutions authorizing future BANs, bonds and loan issues
payload.description: Authorization continues until superseded by subsequent board action

tool_args.label: Annual renewal expectation

payload.claim_text: It is expected that the MTA Finance Department will seek renewed authorization and approval for debt issuance annually hereafter to update debt issuance expectations
payload.description: MTA expects to seek renewed authorization for debt issuance annually

tool_args.label: MTA Finance Department seeks Board authorization

payload.description: MTA Finance Department seeking MTA Board authorization to issue 2026 new money bonds, BANs, and other obligations

tool_args.label: MTA Finance Department seeks TBTA Board authorization

payload.description: MTA Finance Department seeking TBTA Board authorization to issue TBTA Obligations for capital projects

tool_args.label: MTA authorized $7B for transit/commuter

payload.description: MTA authorized up to $7B for transit and commuter capital programs

tool_args.label: MTA authorized $1.5B for working capital

payload.description: MTA authorized up to $1.5B for working capital borrowings

tool_args.label: TBTA authorized $700M for capital projects

payload.description: TBTA authorized up to $700M for TBTA capital projects

tool_args.label: Board adoption follows Finance Committee

payload.description: MTA and TBTA Boards adopt 2026 Supplemental Resolutions on December 17, 2025

tool_args.label: Finance Committee precedes Board adoption

payload.description: Finance Committee approval on 12/15/25 precedes Board action on 12/17/25

tool_args.label: TBTA congestion pricing loan example

payload.claim_text: Last year TBTA entered into a loan in the credit markets secured by congestion pricing revenue to finance 2020-24 capital program transit and commuter projects shortly after the start of congestion pricing.
payload.description: Example of TBTA using loan facility secured by congestion pricing revenue

tool_args.label: MTA RRIF loan for PTC project

payload.claim_text: MTA previously entered into a loan with the federal government under the Railroad Rehabilitation and Improvement Financing Program to finance the positive train control project for Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad.
payload.description: Example of MTA using loan facilities instead of notes or bonds

tool_args.label: MTA New Money Bonds - Fixed Rate Tax-Exempt Interest Cap

payload.raw_value_text: not greater than 10% per annum
payload.scope: Series 2026 New Money Bonds issued as fixed rate Tax-Exempt Obligations
payload.description: Maximum interest rate for fixed rate Tax-Exempt Bonds per Section 2.10(f)

tool_args.label: MTA Series 2026 Notes - Fixed Rate Interest Cap

payload.raw_value_text: true interest cost ... shall not exceed 8.00% per annum
payload.scope: Series 2026 Notes bearing a fixed rate of interest
payload.description: True interest cost cap for fixed rate Series 2026 Notes per Section 2.10(f)(ii)

tool_args.label: TBTA Fixed Rate Tax-Exempt Bond Interest Cap

payload.raw_value_text: not greater than 10% per annum
payload.scope: TBTA Series 2026 New Money Bonds issued as fixed rate Tax-Exempt Obligations
payload.description: Maximum interest rate for TBTA fixed rate Tax-Exempt Bonds per TBTA Section 2.10(f)

tool_args.label: Working capital note maturity limit

payload.raw_value_text: maturity date no later than 12 months from the date of issuance
payload.scope: Series 2026 New Money Working Capital Notes
payload.description: Working capital notes have maximum 12-month maturity per Section 2.01(b)

tool_args.label: Underwriters discount cap for Series 2026 Bonds

payload.raw_value_text: underwriters' discount ... shall not exceed (i) $7.00 for each one thousand dollars ($1,000) principal amount of the Series 2026 Bonds
payload.scope: Series 2026 Bonds sold on a negotiated basis
payload.description: Underwriters discount cap per Section 2.10(h)

warnings: metric_claim.value_unit is accepted as passthrough, but prefer unit. value_unit has only 9 accepted observations; submit one metric per measurement and use unit for the measurement unit.

tool_args.label: Underwriters discount cap for Series 2026 Notes

payload.raw_value_text: $3.50 for each one thousand dollars ($1,000) principal amount of the Series 2026 Notes
payload.scope: Series 2026 Notes sold on a negotiated basis
payload.description: Underwriters discount cap for notes per Section 2.10(h)

warnings: metric_claim.value_unit is accepted as passthrough, but prefer unit. value_unit has only 9 accepted observations; submit one metric per measurement and use unit for the measurement unit.

tool_args.label: Redemption price cap

payload.raw_value_text: Redemption Price shall not be greater than one hundred three percent (103%) of the principal amount
payload.scope: Series 2026 Obligations redeemable at election of Issuer
payload.description: Redemption price cap per Section 2.10(g)

tool_args.label: Series 2026 Obligation denomination

payload.raw_value_text: denomination of $5,000 or any integral multiple thereof
payload.scope: Series 2026 Obligations unless otherwise provided in Certificate of Determination
payload.description: Denomination for Series 2026 Obligations per Section 2.05

tool_args.label: TBTA Additional Covenant - Net Revenues Coverage Ratio

payload.raw_value_text: Net Revenues are at least equal to 1.10 times the Combined Maximum Annual Calculated Debt Service
payload.scope: TBTA Senior Resolution - additional bonds test
payload.description: TBTA covenants not to issue Senior Resolution Obligations unless Net Revenues are at least 1.10 times Combined Maximum Annual Calculated Debt Service

tool_args.label: TBTA Toll Revenue Covenant - 1.10x Coverage

payload.raw_value_text: Revenues less Operating Expenses shall equal at least 1.10 times the sum of Calculated Debt Service
payload.scope: TBTA Facilities - additional covenant to maintain tolls and charges
payload.description: TBTA must maintain tolls such that Revenues less Operating Expenses equal at least 1.10 times total Calculated Debt Service per Section 4.02

tool_args.label: MTA Finance Department requests MTA Board authorization

payload.description: MTA Finance Department seeks MTA and TBTA Board authorization for 2026 debt issuance

tool_args.label: Jaibala Patel is CFO of MTA Finance Department

payload.description: Jaibala Patel is Chief Financial Officer of the MTA Finance Department

tool_args.label: Olga Chernat is Deputy Chief of MTA Finance Department

payload.description: Olga Chernat is Deputy Chief, Financial Services at MTA Finance Department
